stories.title: Ward wants to stay with Browns after Garrett deal
stories.summary: Browns cornerback Denzel Ward says he wants to remain in Cleveland, even after the team traded defensive end Myles Garrett to the Rams.

stories.title: U.S. sharp in narrow WC sendoff loss to Germany
stories.summary: The United States lost 2-1 to Germany at Soldier Field in Chicago on Saturday in its last match before the start of the FIFA World Cup, turning in another solid performance after Sunday's 3-2 win over Senegal.

stories.title: Iran says U.S. denied visas to key WC officials
stories.summary: Iran's soccer federation has accused the United States of "vindictive behavior" after saying that visas were refused for "key managerial and administrative members" of its World Cup team.

stories.title: Childress hoped to reveal new Busch deal at MIS
stories.summary: Richard Childress had hoped to announce a contract extension for Kyle Busch at Michigan. Instead, the longtime owner of RCR held a news conference Saturday to publicly address the two-time Cup Series champion's unexpected death on May 21.

stories.title: Andreeva stymies Chwalinska, wins French Open
stories.summary: Russian teenager Mirra Andreeva ended the run of 114th-ranked Polish qualifier Maja Chwalinska to win the French Open and her first Grand Slam title.
